{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged white madra
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s master's sword is made of [[Forged white madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is made of [[Forged white madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
